reviews.comment:
Antes de cargar, avise que pagaba con la App de YPF y necesitaba factura A. Modalidad habitual hace más de 3 años .
Finaliza la carga de nafta reitero ambas cosas forma de pago y fc.
Me dice el empleado que “los dueños” le prohibieron hacer factura A si se paga con la App!!!!
Que alguien me explique esto.

(Translated by Google)
Before filling up, I informed them that I was paying with the YPF app and needed an invoice (type A). This has been my usual method for over three years. After filling up, I reiterated both the payment method and the invoice requirement. The employee told me that "the owners" had forbidden him from issuing invoices if payment was made through the app!
Can someone please explain this to me?

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia, lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia, estamos trabajando en resolverlo, te esperamos nuevamente y que cumpla tus expectativas, gracias, ACA Belgrano.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service site, although long queues sometimes form and the beach staff don't always have the clarity and experience to expedite the operation, and members have to endure long waits.

reviews.comment:
A quien corresponda feliciten de parte mía a las señoritas mariana y patricia de la sucursal belgrano por la amabilidad, paciencia y tiempo dedicado a mi persona. Personas como las nombradas enaltecen la sucursal que usd tan dignamente dirigen.
Además la excelente  atención del playero LucasValeriano que además me ayudo con mi celular a realizar el pago
Felicitaciones  a ACA Belgrano
Norma Schon
DNI:4.775.725

(Translated by Google)
To whom it may concern, please congratulate Mariana and Patricia from the Belgrano branch for their kindness, patience, and the time they dedicated to me. People like them bring honor to the branch you so admirably manage.

Also, the excellent service from the attendant Lucas Valeriano, who even helped me with my cell phone to make the payment. Congratulations to ACA Belgrano!
Norma Schon
ID: 4,775,725

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Norma!, muchas gracias por tu comentario y calificación, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.
